---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for CivilizationOS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the gap or friction you're hitting.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen. Note which layer it touches - AGORA (citizens/memory),
PANTHEON (councils/debates), TCMF retrieval, the 3-tier router, or the frontend - see
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) ground rule 4 if it's routing-adjacent.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about.

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant (related design notes in `docs/tcmf.md`, related issues,
links). Flag anything that would require `PREMIUM_MODE=true` by default - the app
should stay usable at $0.
